title: Principal Plant Manager at NTPC Capital India

jsonLd.title: Principal Plant Manager at NTPC Capital India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Plant Manager with drive and ambition, NTPC Capital India in Thane is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About NTPC Capital India:
NTPC Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NTPC Capital India!
